caption: 周末又没了。
scene: Sage and Andy sitting side by side on the linen sofa in the evening, both staring flatly at a single wall calendar showing a big crossed-out weekend square, one small window behind them with a crescent moon, their mouths matching flat resigned lines.
bible_hook: §2.5 shared pressure — the Sunday-evening 'where did the weekend go'
rationale: Recent posts leaned on solo work grind and cozy home wins; this pulls the shared existential-tired lane with a fresh calendar-and-moon motif not used in the last 30 days.
